title: [Aso] Syllabus PDF – Content – Subject Detail (科目詳細) – All Curriculum Subject fields rendered
description: Content Verification: PDF Subject Detail section displays all Curriculum Subject fields: 科目名, 必須科目, 主な授業形態, 対象学年, 実施時期, 履修時間, 履修単位.
preconditions: HQ Staff downloaded PDF from a Published Syllabus Master with complete Curriculum Subject data
steps_actions:
1. "Open the downloaded Syllabus PDF"
2. "Locate Subject Detail (科目詳細) section"
3. "Check 科目名 (Subject Name) field"
4. "Check 必須科目 (Mandatory) field"
5. "Check 主な授業形態 (Lesson Format) field"
6. "Check 対象学年 (Target Grade) and 実施時期 (Semester) fields"
7. "Check 履修時間 (Hours) and 履修単位 (Credit) fields"
steps_result:
1. "PDF opens in reader"
2. "Subject Detail section found with label 科目詳細"
3. "科目名 = Webプログラミング演習ⅢA displayed"
4. "必須科目 = Mandatory displayed"
5. "主な授業形態 = Lecture displayed"
6. "対象学年 = Grade 12; 実施時期 = First Semester displayed"
7. "履修時間 = 120時間; 履修単位 = 2単位 displayed"
steps_data:
1. "Downloaded PDF"
2. ""
3. "Expected: Webプログラミング演習ⅢA"
4. "Expected: Mandatory"
5. "Expected: Lecture"
6. "Expected: Grade 12, First Semester"
7. "Expected: 120時間, 2単位"

title: [Aso] Syllabus PDF – Content – Subject Detail – Hours as [X]時間 and Credit as [X]単位 format
description: Format Verification: Hours field displays as [X]時間 and Credit field displays as [X]単位 in Subject Detail section, not just raw numbers.
preconditions: HQ Staff downloaded PDF. Curriculum Subject has Hours = 120, Credit = 2
steps_actions:
1. "Open the downloaded Syllabus PDF"
2. "Locate 履修時間 (Hours) value in Subject Detail section"
3. "Locate 履修単位 (Credit) value in Subject Detail section"
steps_result:
1. "PDF opens"
2. "履修時間 displayed as 120時間 (not just 120)"
3. "履修単位 displayed as 2単位 (not just 2)"

title: [Aso] Syllabus PDF – Content – Subject Detail – Mandatory boolean and picklist values rendered
description: Content Verification: Boolean field 必須科目 and picklist fields (主な授業形態, 対象学年, 実施時期) display correct human-readable values, not raw API values.
preconditions: HQ Staff downloaded PDF. Curriculum Subject: Mandatory=true, Lesson Format=Lecture, Target Grade=Grade 12, Semester=First Semester
steps_actions:
1. "Open the downloaded Syllabus PDF"
2. "Check 必須科目 value"
3. "Check 主な授業形態 value"
4. "Check 対象学年 value"
5. "Check 実施時期 value"
steps_result:
1. "PDF opens"
2. "必須科目 shows Mandatory (not true/false or 1/0)"
3. "主な授業形態 shows Lecture (or JP equivalent 講義)"
4. "対象学年 shows Grade 12"
5. "実施時期 shows First Semester (or JP equivalent 前期)"
steps_data:
1. "Downloaded PDF"
2. "Expected: Mandatory"
3. "Expected: Lecture / 講義"
4. "Expected: Grade 12"
5. "Expected: First Semester / 前期"

steps_data:

title: [Aso] Syllabus PDF – Content – Study Goal – ○ marks match checked evaluation types per row
description: Content Verification: Each Study Goal row displays ○ for checked evaluation types and blank for unchecked types. Values verified against SF data.
preconditions:
HQ Staff downloaded PDF. Syllabus Master has 4 Study Goals.
Goal 1: 言語情報=checked, 運動技能=checked, その他=checked.
Goal 2: 言語情報=checked, 態度・意欲=checked.
steps_actions:
1. "Open the downloaded Syllabus PDF"
2. "Locate Study Goal (到達目標) table"
3. "Check row 1 evaluation type marks"
4. "Check row 2 evaluation type marks"
5. "Verify unchecked types are blank"
steps_result:
1. "PDF opens"
2. "Study Goal table found with ○ marks"
3. "Row 1: 言語情報=○, 知的技能=blank, 運動技能=○, 態度・意欲=blank, その他=○"
4. "Row 2: 言語情報=○, 知的技能=blank, 運動技能=blank, 態度・意欲=○, その他=blank"
5. "All unchecked types display as blank (no mark)"
steps_data:
1. "Downloaded PDF"
2. ""
3. "Expected: ○ in 言語情報, 運動技能, その他"
4. "Expected: ○ in 言語情報, 態度・意欲"
5. "Expected: blank for unchecked"

title: [Aso] Syllabus PDF – Content – Evaluation Criteria – Explanation text (成績評価基準) rendered at bottom
description: Content Verification: PDF displays the Evaluation Criteria explanation text (成績評価基準) at the bottom of the Evaluation section with full grading methodology (S/A/B/C/D thresholds).
preconditions: HQ Staff downloaded PDF. Curriculum Subject has evaluation explanation text configured
steps_actions:
1. "Open the downloaded Syllabus PDF"
2. "Locate Evaluation Criteria (評価方法) section"
3. "Scroll past the evaluation criteria table"
4. "Check the explanation text (成績評価基準) content"
steps_result:
1. "PDF opens"
2. "Evaluation Criteria section found"
3. "Below the criteria table, explanation text section found"
4. "Text displays: 以上を下記の観点・割合で評価する。成績評価基準は、S(90点以上）・A（80点以上）・B（70点以上）・C（60点以上）・D（59点以下）とする。"
steps_data:
1. "Downloaded PDF"
2. ""
3. ""
4. "Expected: 成績評価基準 text matches Curriculum Subject data"
